title: potentilla recta subsp. asturica
intro: Potentilla recta subsp. asturica, also known as the Spanish cinquefoil, is a plant species belonging to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its yellow flowers and a sprawling habit. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla recta subsp. asturica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
